secrets.description: Usernode blockchain address that receives 1-token guess payments (server-side debit destination). Required in production — when unset, /api/config reports payments_configured:false and /api/guess returns 503 'On-chain payments are not configured'. Staging falls back to a mock placeholder.
Private key for APP_PUBKEY — signs payout and result-memo transactions
Optional CoinGecko API key for higher rate limits (x-cg-demo-api-key header)
Usernode chain id used to look up and verify each guess's on-chain payment transaction
Optional public block-explorer transaction-page base URL; the on-chain receipt hash is appended to it for the 'View on-chain' link (e.g. https://explorer.example/tx/)

tests.name: Reward boost badge shows when pot milestone reached
Guess screen renders the wallet-status block
Guess screen renders the stake selector
Top Guessers leaderboard renders player rows
My Predictions tab renders prediction cards
On-chain receipt link renders on a prediction card
Profile page renders identity card and stats
